meta.name: Onchain Automation Trigger Catalogue (AVM Native)
meta.description: Source of truth for triggers targeting Algorand AVM. Supports Algorand addresses, Asset IDs, and microAlgo units.

chain.question: Which chain should I use? (Default: Algorand Testnet)

rpc_url.question: Please provide the Algod RPC URL.

wallet_address.question: Which Algorand Agent Wallet address should execute this automation?

interval.question: What interval should I use? Example: 5m, 1h, 24h

asset.question: Which Asset ID (ASA) or native ALGO should I track?

quote_currency.question: Which quote currency should I use? Example: USD

threshold.question: What threshold should trigger this automation?

lower_bound.question: What lower bound should I use?

upper_bound.question: What upper bound should I use?

percent_change.question: What percent change should trigger this automation?

period.question: What period should I use? Example: 1h, 24h

price_source.question: Which price source should I use? Example: pact, tinyman

token.question: Which ASA or ALGO balance should I watch?

token_address.question: What is the Algorand Asset ID (ASA)?

recipient_address.question: What is the recipient Algorand address?

minimum_amount.question: What minimum amount (in ALGO or microAlgos) should I use?

contract_address.question: Which Application ID or Account should I monitor?

event_signature.question: What transaction note or app-call method should I watch for?

watched_address.question: Which Algorand address should I monitor?

gas_threshold.question: What fee threshold (in microAlgos) should I use?

health_source.question: Which network health source should I use?

collection.question: Which NFT/ARC collection should I use?

floor_price_source.question: Which floor price source should I use?

trait_filter.question: What NFT trait filter should I use?

claim_method.question: How does the faucet claim work?

api_url.question: What API URL should I use?

response_field.question: Which response field should I read from the API?

operator.question: Which comparison operator should I use?

feed_url.question: What feed URL should I monitor?

duration.question: How long should the condition remain true?

previous_step_reference.question: Which previous step should this depend on?

notification_cooldown.question: How many seconds should we wait between notifications? (Optional, default is 300s)

triggers.description: Run once at a specific date and time.
Run every day at a fixed time.
Trigger when ALGO or ASA price goes below threshold.
Trigger when ALGO or ASA price goes above threshold.
Trigger when Algorand wallet balance falls below threshold (use ALGO or MicroAlgos).
Trigger when Algorand wallet balance rises above threshold (use ALGO or MicroAlgos).
Trigger when an incoming payment is detected in the Algorand wallet address. Supports {{amount}} and {{new_balance}} placeholders.
Trigger when an Algorand Application emits a specific log or state change.
Trigger on every new Algorand block (every ~3 seconds).
Trigger when a watched Algorand address performs activity.
Trigger when a webhook is received.
